name: MATXSR
description:
MATXSR

MATXSR formats multigroup cross-section data from GENDF tapes (produced by GROUPR) into a MATXS library file. The MATXS format is used by deterministic transport codes such as TRANSX and PARTISN. MATXSR can combine neutron, photon, and charged-particle data for multiple materials into a single unified library.

Key features:
  • Reads one or more GENDF tapes from GROUPR/GAMINR
  • Produces a single MATXS-format library
  • Supports multiple particle types (neutrons, photons, protons, etc.)
  • Handles multiple data types (total, scatter, gamma production, etc.)
  • Combines multiple materials into one library file
tooltip: Format multigroup cross sections from GENDF tapes into a MATXS library for deterministic transport codes.

parameters.name: ngen1
parameters.help:
'ngen1'

Unit for neutron GENDF input tape (from GROUPR).

parameters.name: hsetid
parameters.help:
'hsetid'

One or more Hollerith identification lines for the MATXS library.

parameters.name: particles
parameters.help:
'particles'

List of particle definitions, each with 'name' (e.g. 'n', 'g') and 'ngrp' (number of energy groups).

parameters.name: data_types
parameters.help:
'data_types'

List of data type definitions, each with 'name' (e.g. 'nscat'), 'jinp' (input particle index), and 'joutp' (output particle index).

parameters.name: materials
parameters.help:
'materials'

List of material definitions, each with 'hmat' (material name), 'matno' (MAT number or isotope name), and optional 'matgg' (secondary GENDF unit).

parameters.name: ngen3
parameters.help:
'ngen3'

Unit for additional particle GENDF input tape (0=none).

parameters.name: ngen4
parameters.help:
'ngen4'

Unit for additional particle GENDF input tape (0=none).

parameters.name: ngen5
parameters.help:
'ngen5'

Unit for additional particle GENDF input tape (0=none).

parameters.name: ngen6
parameters.help:
'ngen6'

Unit for additional particle GENDF input tape (0=none).

parameters.name: ngen7
parameters.help:
'ngen7'

Unit for additional particle GENDF input tape (0=none).

parameters.name: ngen8
parameters.help:
'ngen8'

Unit for additional particle GENDF input tape (0=none).
